title: Nitish Reddy unlocks pace potential: All-rounder bumps up pace to increase cross-format utility

content:

This improvement has caught the eye of chief selector Ajit Agarkar.  Reddy is now seen as a key player for India's future.  Bowl…"*—highlights new trends and shifting patterns across the region.
